programs.title: Family Guy
programs.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in Rhode Island. Chris gets into the cool kids' club when Lois joins his school as a substitute teacher.

programs.title: Family Guy
programs.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter feels emasculated when he abandons Lois during a 'shark' attack on their anniversary, and Stewie finds a mini-fridge.

programs.title: Family Guy
programs.desc: Animated sitcom. Stewie tries to civilise his half-brother so he can get adopted, and Meg and Chris start an online venture that involves sitting on cupcakes.

programs.title: American Dad!
programs.desc: Stan is a wanted man and on the run from bounty hunter Roger. He soon finds himself in a small Arizona town which is being terrorised by Bullock and his gang.

programs.title: American Dad!
programs.desc: Stan and Hayley team up to stop a terrorist plot to blow up the Bazooka Sharks arena, while Roger concocts a new persona who works as an escort.

programs.title: Bob's Burgers
programs.desc: Animated comedy. Nat recruits the Belchers for a limo racing contest that triggers Tina's anxieties about her future prom, and Linda plans a girls' night.
